3. The following terms and conditions shall be strictly followed by all concerned while spending the said funds.
1) In declaring the Cell Officer (Help-03) as the Controlling Officer for disbursement of the said funds.
The funds are coming from BEAMS to the Superintending Engineer, Public Works Board, Nanded.
Action should be taken to make it available on the system.
(2) The Superintending Engineer, Public Works Board, Nanded shall receive the same under this order.
Nidhi Executive Engineer, Public Works Department, Nanded as per the progress of works.
The budget distribution system should be delivered immediately through BEAMS.
3) Funds sanctioned under this order by the Executive Engineer, Public Works Department, Nanded
On receipt, pending payments for civil works should be paid immediately, followed by completion of works.
Report immediately to the Government, Divisional Commissioner, Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar and Collector, Nanded.
be submitted.
4) The funds sanctioned and received under this order are spent on the sanctioned civic amenities works only.
to be made and in any case beyond the grant sanctioned at the time of expenditure of the said fund.
The executive engineer should make sure that there will not be too much expense.
5) The Project Officer concerned should ensure that the sanctioned funds are not spent on works other than those approved by the Government.
6) The concerned Executive Engineer concerned on completion of the civil facility proposed in all respects.
be transferred to the Zilla Parishad and the Government through the District Collector, Nanded.
Report to the Department of Rehabilitation.
